leadText: Not to be confused with Sketch (move). Doodle (Japanese: うつしえ Trace) is a non-damaging Normal-type move introduced in Generation IX. It is the signature move of Grafaiai.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Doodle changes the Abilities of the user and any ally to the targeted Pokémon's Ability. Doodle will fail if either the target, the user, or the user's ally have any of the following Abilities: As One , Battle Bond , Comatose , Commander , Disguise , Gulp Missile , Ice Face , Multitype , Poison Puppeteer , Power Construct , Protosynthesis , Quark Drive , RKS System , Schooling , Shields Down , Stance Change , Zen Mode , or Zero to Hero . It will also fail if the target has Receiver , but not if the user or its ally has it.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V The user captures the very essence of the target in a sketch. This changes the Abilities of the user and its ally Pokémon to that of the target.
